summary: Product manager with 4+ years of experience defining and launching tech products. Strong in user research, roadmapping, and cross-functional leadership. Track record of delivering products that achieve market fit and business objectives.

experience.title: Senior Product Manager
highlights: Led launch of B2B SaaS product growing ARR to $5M in 18 months
Increased user retention by 35% through improved onboarding flow
Managed cross-functional team of 12 including engineers and designers

experience.title: Associate Product Manager
highlights: Conducted 100+ user interviews to inform product roadmap
Shipped mobile app with 4.8 star rating on App Store
